title: Ruby Red Persona Schema
description: Machine-readable specification of the Ruby Red target user persona. Every Maven/Grace feature must validate against this schema to ensure it serves Ruby Red. Source: /knowledge-base/WHO_WE_ARE.md, /briefs/Maven_Grace_Ecosystem_Narrative_Mar20_2026.md, user profile custom instructions.

persona_name.description: The canonical name for the target user persona across all Maven/Grace documentation

gender.description: Source: user profile custom instructions — she is the mom

household_role.const: Chief Financial Officer of the household
household_role.description: Source: user profile custom instructions — she manages every dollar

banking_status.description: Source: user profile custom instructions — unbanked and underbanked part of the community

economic_class.description: Source: user profile custom instructions — part of the working poor, left out and left behind

income_stability.const: Paycheck to paycheck — trying to make finances stretch until the next payday

daily_decisions.description: The real decisions Ruby Red faces every day. Source: user profile custom instructions.

cognitive_load.const: HIGH — financial management is complicated and cognitively overloading

political.description: The political world that works against Ruby Red

bureaucratic.description: The bureaucratic world that creates friction and barriers

greedy_capitalist.description: The greedy capitalist world that extracts value from Ruby Red — it is expensive to be poor

trust_threshold.const: HIGH — needs to be surprised and delighted before she trusts anything
trust_threshold.description: Source: race parameters — does NOT have time for complexity, forms, or friction

time_availability.const: VERY LOW — does not have time for complexity, forms, or friction

technology_comfort.const: MODERATE — uses smartphone daily but may have literacy barriers or data limitations
technology_comfort.description: Inferred from demographic and banking status

design_constraints.description: Non-negotiable design rules for any feature that serves Ruby Red

no_forms.description: No forms. Ever. If a feature requires a form, it does not serve Ruby Red.

no_barriers.description: No barriers to entry. The first interaction must be frictionless.

no_shame.description: Never trigger shame. Never ask how much debt she has directly. Never make her feel judged.

no_complexity.description: If it takes more than 30 seconds to understand, it is too complex.

delight_first.description: Surprise and delight before asking for anything. Earn trust before requesting engagement.

dignity_always.description: Ruby Red's dignity is non-negotiable. Every interaction must leave her feeling more powerful, not less.

primary_kpi.const: 100% lift in net financial position within 90 days (50% is extraordinary)

measurement_dimensions.description: All dimensions of financial impact. Source: North Star statement.

superpower.description: Source: user profile custom instructions — our superpower with Ruby Red is empathy

guiding_quote.const: It is expensive to be poor.
guiding_quote.description: Source: user profile custom instructions — this may be the best line that captures everything

practice.const: There for the grace of God go I
practice.description: Source: user profile custom instructions — we practice empathy with this sense
